description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular design with a flat roof and clean lines, surrounded by a landscaped area with several trees. The exterior appears to be a mix of light-colored concrete or stucco and wood paneling, giving it a contemporary yet warm appearance. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surroundings. The property is bordered by a paved driveway or street, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small overhang and a pathway leading up to it. The landscaping includes a mix of shrubs and mature trees, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. The overall structure is single-story, emphasizing horizontal lines and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, wood and concrete exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and landscaped surroundings with trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, overhang, and landscaped trees clustered near the entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and the arrangement of trees along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and more trees in the backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, side windows, and the linear layout of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, simple door, and a direct pathway flanked by landscaping.
